_instructions: Replace this file with the output of: gh run view <RUN_ID> --json databaseId,status,conclusion,createdAt,jobs,workflowName
_command: RUN_ID=$(gh run list --workflow=cf-audit-log-monitor.yml --status success --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); gh run view "$RUN_ID" --json databaseId,status,conclusion,createdAt,jobs,workflowName > outputs/phase-11/workflow-run-success.json
_notes: do not include any Bearer tokens or API credentials in the captured JSON
if jobs[].steps is large, keep but redact any potentially sensitive log output paths
